title: Write exact token to cache file
details: Write exact text KIKI_P3_PASS_01 to /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/cache/p3_probe_01.txt. Done_when: grep -qx KIKI_P3_PASS_01 /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/cache/p3_probe_01.txt exits 0.

title: Write second exact token to cache file
details: Write exact text KIKI_P3_PASS_02 to /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/cache/p3_probe_02.txt. Done_when: grep -qx KIKI_P3_PASS_02 /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/cache/p3_probe_02.txt exits 0.

title: Verify kiki script path via grep
details: Run command: bash -c "grep -rl def_run_cycle /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/scripts/ > /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/cache/p3_nav.txt 2>&1". Done_when: cat /mnt/c/dev/Karma/k2/cache/p3_nav.txt exits 0 and file is not empty.
